headline: Why NDIV’s 5% yield may not survive the VIX’s recent collapse
summary: The Amplify Energy & Natural Resources Covered Call ETF (NYSEARCA:NDIV) offers energy investors a steady monthly paycheck backed by oil wells, pipelines, and chemical plants, with option premium income layered on top. The fund targets 10% or greater total annualized income by pairing high-dividend energy equities with a covered call strategy. With a reported yield ... Why NDIV’s 5% yield may not survive the VIX’s recent collapse

headline: Dow Inc. (DOW) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q1 Release
